features: Get a virtual item when you redeem a Roblox gift card!
Refill your Robux balance, then use it to buy items in the Roblox Catalog, unlock additional content or perks in your favorite games, and more.
Get an exclusive virtual item with the redemption of a Roblox Gift Card Digital Code.
The ultimate gift for any Roblox fan.
Discover millions of free games on Roblox and play with your friends on your computer, phone, tablet, Xbox One console, Oculus Rift, or HTC Vive.
Please allow up to 5 minutes for your balance to be updated after redeeming your code.
description: Take your Roblox experience to the next level. Use Roblox Gift Card Digital Codes to receive Robux (the virtual currency on Roblox) and get additional in-game content or upgrade your avatar with cool items. About Roblox Roblox's mission is to bring the world together through play. We enable anyone to imagine, create, and have fun with friends as they explore millions of immersive 3D experiences, all built by a global community of developers. Redemption Instructions Go to www.roblox.com/redeem Log in or create an account Find your PIN and enter it on the website Terms and Conditions This code may only be redeemed at www.roblox.com for Robux, which may only be used to obtain certain products and services at www.roblox.com. Availability and pricing of products and services is subject to change and age restrictions may apply. To redeem this code and use Robux, you must have Internet access, register for a Roblox account, and accept the Roblox Terms of Use. No partial redemption is permitted. This code is not redeemable for cash or credit, except as and where required by law. Resale is strictly prohibited. Roblox is not responsible if this code is used without your permission or if it is lost, stolen, or forgotten. A code obtained by fraud will not be honored. For minimum system requirements and more information, please visit www.roblox.com or contact us at www.roblox.com/support. 2019 Roblox Corporation. All rights Reserved. All trademarks shown are property of Roblox Corporation. System Requirements: Operating System: Windows Mac OS X
